note: 04-variables.md §Rules · binding-name collisions with the reserved words output·status·error·started_at·ended_at·duration_ms are forbidden at parse time. Namespace choice · NIKA-PARSE (not NIKA-VAR) because the rule is schema-checkable structure (workflow.schema.json propertyNames) and the runner emits NIKA-PARSE for the structural layer · NIKA-VAR-NNN is reserved for reference RESOLUTION and binding EVALUATION errors (04 §Binding rules).
